title: Dashboard information hierarchy and typography for glanceability
description:
Redesign dashboard widget content for at-a-glance readability on a wall-mounted tablet:
- Establish clear visual hierarchy: what's most urgent is most visually prominent
- Use size, color, and weight to differentiate importance levels
- Today's events and overdue tasks should be visually dominant
- Shopping list shows summary (X of Y items), not full list
- Transit shows next arrival time prominently with route and direction

This is design-driven work. Olivia Hart (Design Lead) should review the layout before implementation.

Acceptance criteria:
- Dashboard scans in under 5 seconds from arm's length
- Visual hierarchy is clear — urgent items stand out
- Typography is legible at 3-4 feet on a 10-inch tablet
